posting.sourceTitle: Plumbers and Pipefitters Binghamton LU #112 (Northern Zone)
posting.locationSummary: Central, Mohawk Valley, and North Country regions of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at ualocal112.org during the recruitment period, or pick up and complete an application in person at Local Union #112’s Northern Zone office on the first working Wednesday of each month.
posting.applicationHours: 8:30 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. on the first working Wednesday of each month, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old at time of employment and sign an affidavit attesting to this.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED, recognized by local school authorities, and sign an affidavit attesting to this.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a physical examination and a drug test after selection and prior to enrollment; the sponsor pays the cost.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend related instruction classes at the approved school and sign a scholarship loan agreement in conjunction with those classes if accepted.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old at time of employment and sign an affidavit attesting to this. Proof may be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED, as recognized by local school authorities. Must sign an affidavit attesting to this. Proof may be required.
Must pass a physical examination and a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.

Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically able to do the work of a Plumber and Steamfitter, which may include working regularly at varying heights and in hot and cold temperatures indoors and outdoors.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must provide DD-214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must sign a scholarship loan agreement in conjunction with related instruction classes, if accepted to the program.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or HSE, pass a physical and drug test, have reliable transportation, and be able to perform the work and attend required classes.
